On Tue, Jun 13, 2000 at 09:49:51AM -0700, Steve Kargl wrote:
 > Add
 > 
 > CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--without-curses
 > 
 > to the ports makefile.
 
 Gerald, would this be an acceptable solution until (at least) ncurses is
 fixed in the base system ?
